insight.headline: Market-driven shipping
insight.what_changed: The GraphQL Admin API now supports market-driven shipping configuration, allowing apps to configure shipping directly on a market. This change is part of the 2026-07 API version. Market-driven shipping moves merchant-owned shipping configuration out of delivery profiles and into Markets.
insight.developer_impact: Developers should update their apps to use the new market-driven shipping configuration. This may involve migrating existing shipping configurations to the new market-driven model. Apps can use the GraphQL Admin API to configure shipping directly on a market, which helps support different shipping scenarios. Developers should review the API documentation for the 2026-07 version to understand the changes and updates.
insight.merchant_impact: Merchants will be able to configure shipping directly on a market, which provides more flexibility and control over their shipping options. This change may require merchants to update their shipping configurations to take advantage of the new market-driven shipping model.
insight.why_it_matters: Market-driven shipping provides more flexibility and control over shipping configurations, which is important for merchants who need to support different shipping scenarios. This change is a key part of Shopify's efforts to improve the shipping experience for merchants and their customers.

also_worth_knowing.text: OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus now returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill

updates.title: [DRAFT] Markets APIs now support MarketRegionSubdivision
updates.summary: Markets APIs now support MarketRegionSubdivision, allowing sub-region markets to be configured with country-subdivision regions. This feature is available in the Admin GraphQL API 2026-07 release candidate.

updates.title: OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus now returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill
updates.summary: The OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus enum now returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill, starting from API version 2026-10.

updates.title: Shop Minis May June 2026 update
updates.summary: The React SDK for Shop Minis has added typed product variant intent hooks for selecting variants, adding variants to cart, and sending buyers to express checkout.

updates.title: Market-driven shipping now available in feature preview
updates.summary: Market-driven shipping is now available in feature preview, allowing merchants to attach shipping options directly to each market and vary rates by product or location.

updates.title: @shopify/mini-oxygen@4.2.0
updates.summary: The @shopify/mini-oxygen package has been updated to version 4.2.0, making the Oxygen Vite plugin self-sufficient by inferring a compatibility date from the resolved Hydrogen package.

updates.title: @shopify/cli-hydrogen@13.0.0
updates.summary: The @shopify/cli-hydrogen package has been updated to version 13.0.0, adding deploy flags and environment variables for configuring Oxygen's client assets directory and worker directory.

updates.title: Draft order deposit fields are now available in the GraphQL Admin API and Customer Account API
updates.summary: Draft order deposit fields are now available in the GraphQL Admin API and Customer Account API, starting from API version 2026-07.

updates.title: Deprecation of cumulative marketing engagements
updates.summary: The isCumulative argument to the marketingEngagementCreate mutation is being deprecated, defaulting to false, and should be updated to send non-cumulative engagements.

updates.title: New `lineItem` field on the `GiftCard` object
updates.summary: The GiftCard object in the GraphQL Admin API now includes a lineItem field, representing the LineItem from the order that initiated the gift card's creation.

updates.title: Discount application information now available for draft orders on the Customer Account API
updates.summary: Discount application information is now available for draft orders on the Customer Account API, starting from GraphQL Customer Account API version 2026-07.

updates.title: `discountedUnitPrice` on `DraftOrderLineItem` Customer Account API deprecation
updates.summary: The discountedUnitPrice field on the DraftOrderLineItem object in the Customer Account API is now deprecated and should be replaced with approximateDiscountedUnitPrice.

updates.title: `BusinessEntity` now exposes `legalEntityId` in the GraphQL Admin API
updates.summary: The BusinessEntity type in the GraphQL Admin API now includes a new legalEntityId field, starting from API version 2026-07, which returns the stable Central Legal Entity ID from Shopify's Organizations Platform.

recap.headline: Market-driven shipping, GraphQL Admin API updates, and Hydrogen deployments

themes.title: Market-driven shipping
themes.detail: Market-driven shipping is now available in feature preview, allowing merchants to attach shipping options directly to each market and vary rates by product. The GraphQL Admin API supports market-driven shipping configuration as of API version 2026-07. Merchant-owned delivery profile APIs are deprecated for market-driven shipping.

themes.title: GraphQL Admin API updates
themes.detail: The GraphQL Admin API has been updated with new features, including support for MarketRegionSubdivision, OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus, draft order deposit fields, and discount application information for draft orders. The BusinessEntity type now exposes a legalEntityId field, and the GiftCard object includes a lineItem field.

themes.title: Hydrogen and deployment updates
themes.detail: Hydrogen now deploys to Vercel, and the @shopify/mini-oxygen and @shopify/cli-hydrogen packages have been updated with new features and bug fixes. The React SDK has been updated with typed product variant intent hooks.

actions.text: Update integrations to use non-cumulative marketing engagements
Update code to use approximateDiscountedUnitPrice instead of deprecated discountedUnitPrice
